/usr/bin/ar qc libdeadliner_core.a CMakeFiles/deadliner_core.dir/deadliner_core_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner_core.dir/src/domain/logic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner_core.dir/src/infrastructure/logging/logging.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner_core.dir/src/infrastructure/settings/settings_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner_core.dir/src/infrastructure/storage/repository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner_core.dir/src/infrastructure/platform/autostart_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner_core.dir/src/application/services.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner_core.dir/src/ui/reminder_dialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner_core.dir/src/ui/break_window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner_core.dir/src/ui/common/display_strings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner_core.dir/src/ui/event_dialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner_core.dir/src/ui/events/events_page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner_core.dir/src/ui/i18n/language_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner_core.dir/src/ui/profile_dialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner_core.dir/src/ui/main_window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner_core.dir/src/ui/onboarding/onboarding_dialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner_core.dir/src/ui/profiles/profiles_page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner_core.dir/src/ui/settings/settings_page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner_core.dir/src/ui/settings/theme_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner_core.dir/src/ui/statistics/statistics_page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner_core.dir/src/ui/today/today_page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner_core.dir/src/ui/tray_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner_core.dir/src/ui/widgets/empty_state_widget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner_core.dir/src/app/app_controller.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libdeadliner_core.a
